'''basazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fmt|fmt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fmt|fmt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| basazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæsæzhæth|bæsæzhæth]] || [[word:bæsæzhæj|bæsæzhæj]] || [[word:bæsæzhæsh|bæsæzhæsh]] || [[word:bæsæzhæ|bæsæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:basasazhath|basasazhath]] || [[word:basasazhaj|basasazhaj]] || [[word:basasazhash|basasazhash]] || [[word:basasazha|basasazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:basazhath|basazhath]] || [[word:basazhaj|basazhaj]] || [[word:basazhash|basazhash]] || [[word:basazha|basazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:basafzhath|basafzhath]] || [[word:basafzhaj|basafzhaj]] || [[word:basafzhash|basafzhash]] || [[word:basafzhaf|basafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:basazhatha|basazhatha]] || [[word:basazhaja|basazhaja]] || [[word:basazhasha|basazhasha]] || [[word:basazhaka|basazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:basazhath|basazhath]] || [[word:basazhaj|basazhaj]] || [[word:basazhash|basazhash]] || [[word:basazha|basazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:basazhathal|basazhathal]] || [[word:basazhajal|basazhajal]] || [[word:basazhashal|basazhashal]] || [[word:basazhakal|basazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:basazhathatha|basazhathatha]] || [[word:basazhajaja|basazhajaja]] || [[word:basazhashasha|basazhashasha]] || [[word:basazhaka|basazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:basazhathan|basazhathan]] || [[word:basazhajan|basazhajan]] || [[word:basazhashan|basazhashan]] || [[word:basazhakan|basazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:basazhathaoro|basazhathaoro]] || [[word:basazhajaoro|basazhajaoro]] || [[word:basazhashaoro|basazhashaoro]] || [[word:basazhakaoro|basazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
